name: Θ Hidden Forbidden Battlefield
author: ᵂᶤʳᵉᵈ
description: Coite-Bodher was the final battleground between the humans and Mag Mell‚ the battle dragon of the gods․ Unable to defeat the dragon‚ the humans prepared an altar as a trap to turn the dragon into stone․ Mag Mell's final scream desolated the plains‚ bathing it in perpetual night․ The Inverted City‚ Megin Fi - built upon the sealed dragon - floats above the lake․ Faithfully recreated from the game ․hack⁄⁄GU Last Recode
